tools.name: intersections.getIntersectionsNearestOutputFormat
tools.description: Represents the closest intersection to a given point

tools.name: intersections.getIntersectionsNearOutputFormat
tools.description: Represents intersections near a given point

tools.name: intersections.getIntersectionsWithinOutputFormat
tools.description: Represents all intersections within a given area

tools.name: occupants.getOccupantsAddressesOutputFormat
tools.description: Represents the set of occupants whose addresses best match a given query address. Every occupant has an associated site which has a standardized address and a coordinate location on the Earth.

tools.name: occupants.getOccupantsNearestOutputFormat
tools.description: Represents the closest occupant to a given point

tools.name: occupants.getOccupantsNearOutputFormat
tools.description: Represents occupants near a given point in order of closest to farthest

tools.name: occupants.getOccupantsWithinOutputFormat
tools.description: Represents all occupants within a given area

tools.name: parcels.getParcelsPidsSiteIdOutputFormat
tools.description: Represents all parcel identifiers associated with an individual site

tools.name: sites.getAddressesOutputFormat
tools.description: Represents the set of geocoded and standardized sites and intersections whose address best matches a given query address.

tools.name: sites.getSitesNearestOutputFormat
tools.description: Represents the site nearest a given point

tools.name: sites.getSitesNearOutputFormat
tools.description: Represents sites near a given point in the order of closest to farthest

tools.name: sites.getSitesSiteIdSubsitesOutputFormat
tools.description: Represents all subsites of a given site

tools.name: sites.getSitesWithinOutputFormat
tools.description: Represents sites within a given area

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
